business.name: Electrician Fort Myers
business.tagline: Same-day service that actually means same day

hero.headline: When the power's out, *we're already on our way*
hero.subheadline: Same-day electrical service in Fort Myers. No waiting around, no runaround — just fast fixes at fair prices.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every wire, outlet, and panel
services_section.subheading: From quick fixes to full rewires — we handle it all

services.title: Panel Upgrades & Repairs
services.description: Old breaker box acting up? We'll get your electrical panel running safely and up to code. No more flickering lights or tripped breakers.

services.title: Outlet & Switch Installation
services.description: Need more outlets or switches in new spots? We'll wire them in clean and code-compliant. USB outlets, GFCI protection — whatever works best.

services.title: Lighting Solutions
services.description: Interior, exterior, recessed, ceiling fans — we install it all. From single fixtures to whole-house lighting upgrades.

services.title: Emergency Electrical Repairs
services.description: Power outages, sparking outlets, burning smells — we respond fast to keep your home safe. Available for urgent electrical issues.

about.heading: Fast, affordable electrical work in Fort Myers
about.body: We're the electricians Fort Myers calls when they need it done right and done fast. Same-day service isn't just marketing talk — we actually show up when we say we will. From small repairs to major electrical work, we keep it simple: fair prices, quality work, and no waiting around for weeks to get on the schedule.

reviews_section.label: WORD OF MOUTH
reviews_section.heading: What Fort Myers neighbors are saying

reviews.name: Luis D.
reviews.text: Super responsive and affordable! Happy with their work and communication. Had issues with other companies but these guys are fast.

reviews.name: Heurides H.
reviews.text: One of the best electricians in the Fort Myers area. Great price and communication — they came out same day for our small project.

reviews.name: Keily R.
reviews.text: A+ for great service and how quickly they came to our house. Very happy with them. Highly recommended.

reviews.name: Laura M.
reviews.text: Exceptional work replacing two electrical boxes in my office. Will definitely hire them again.

cta.heading: Need an electrician today?
cta.body: Same-day service, fair prices, and work that's done right the first time. Get your free estimate now.
